---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it unlock?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples, or links to related issues.
